mapper.sql: select l.id, l.name, c.lname as chute_name, l.cars, l.fulls, l.bigs, l.yiwu, l.shitype, l.videopath, l.imgpath, l.timecha, l.createdate, l.is_deleted, l.create_user, l.create_dept, l.create_time, l.update_user, l.update_time, l.status, l.ctype, l.company, l.person, l.forkcar, l.water, l.mud, l.safeline, l.shift, l.`groups`, l.persons, l.rate from a_cars_logs l left join a_camera c on c.id = l.name
mapper.insert: insert into a_cars_logs(name, cars, fulls, bigs, yiwu, shitype, videopath, imgpath, timecha, createdate, is_deleted, create_user, create_dept, create_time, status, ctype, company, person, forkcar, water, mud, safeline, shift, `groups`, persons, rate) values(#{name}, #{cars}, #{fulls}, #{bigs}, #{yiwu}, #{shitype}, #{videopath}, #{imgpath}, #{timecha}, #{createdate}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{createDept}, sysdate(), #{status}, #{ctype}, #{company}, #{person}, #{forkcar}, #{water}, #{mud}, #{safeline}, #{shift}, #{groups}, #{persons}, #{rate})
mapper.update:
update a_cars_logs
name = #{name}, cars = #{cars}, fulls = #{fulls}, bigs = #{bigs}, yiwu = #{yiwu}, shitype = #{shitype}, videopath = #{videopath}, imgpath = #{imgpath}, timecha = #{timecha}, createdate = #{createdate}, status = #{status}, ctype = #{ctype}, company = #{company}, person = #{person}, forkcar = #{forkcar}, water = #{water}, mud = #{mud}, safeline = #{safeline}, shift = #{shift}, `groups` = #{groups}, persons = #{persons}, rate = #{rate}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = sysdate()
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = '0'

update a_cars_logs set is_deleted = '1', update_time = sysdate() where id in
#{id}
